things.name: Gandantegchinlen Monastery
things.description: Mongolia's most important Buddhist monastery with a 26.5m gold-plated Janraisig statue

things.name: National Museum of Mongolia
things.description: Mongolian history from the Stone Age through the Mongol Empire to Soviet era

things.name: Sukhbaatar Square
things.description: Central square with the Parliament Building, Genghis Khan statue and independence monument

things.name: Bogd Khan Palace Museum
things.description: Winter palace of the last Bogd Khan with extraordinary Buddhist art collection

things.name: Terelj National Park
things.description: 60km from UB - dramatic granite landscapes, ger camps and Genghis Khan Equestrian Statue

things.name: Genghis Khan Equestrian Statue
things.description: World's largest equestrian statue - 40m stainless steel on the vast Mongolian steppe

things.name: Choijin Lama Temple Museum
things.description: Early 20th-century Buddhist temple complex with terrifying Tantric deity masks and art

things.name: Naadam Festival
things.description: Mongolia's greatest festival with the Three Manly Games: wrestling, archery and horse racing

things.name: Black Market (Narantuul Bazaar)
things.description: Enormous outdoor market selling everything from deel robes to motorbike parts

things.name: Natural History Museum
things.description: Dinosaur fossils from the Gobi Desert including Velociraptor and Protoceratops specimens
